questions.question: 'Good Morning, Vietnam' stars this actor as a popular DJ for the Armed Forces Radio Service.
The birth of Elizabeth Jordan Carr in December 1981 was notable for what reason?
questions.answer: First US birth from in vitro fertilization, also called a test-tube baby

questions.question: This 1980s police drama pioneered the use of handheld cameras in its production.
This actress released many '80s workout videos.
